# CreditCookbook.com

> CreditCookbook is a free, open-source credit education platform built by Caleb Pierre Ventures LLC.

## About

CreditCookbook provides plain-English guides, letter templates, interactive tools, and reference resources for personal credit remedy and business credit building. All content is educational, community-verifiable, and grounded in legitimate consumer-protection law (FCRA, FDCPA, CFPB, FTC channels).

## What We Offer

- **Personal Credit Remedy:** FCRA dispute process, FDCPA enforcement, letter templates, escalation guides
- **Business Credit:** Entity setup, DUNS/Paydex, Net-30 vendor tradelines, funding readiness
- **Tools:** Dispute letter generator, utilization calculator, statutory damages estimator, business credit readiness checklist — all client-side, no data collected
- **Resources:** FICO score breakdown, plain-English glossary, links to official sources (CFPB, FTC, bureaus)

## Principles

- Everything is free and open-source (GitHub: github.com/ghettoeinstein/creditcookbook.com)
- No credit repair upsells, no paid services
- All tools run client-side — no data leaves your browser
- All legal claims are verifiable against primary sources

## Contact

## Legal Disclaimer

All content on CreditCookbook is for educational purposes only and does not constitute legal or financial advice. Consult a qualified attorney or financial advisor for your specific situation.
